word: H2688 - חַצְצֹון תָּמָר - Chatsᵉtsôwn Tâmâr - khats-ets-one' taw-mawr' - Hazezon-tamar

sections.paragraph:
Original: חצצן תּמר חצצון תּמר

Transliteration: chatstsôn tâmâr chatsătsôn tâmâr

Phonetic: khats-ets-one' taw-mawr'

BDB Definition:

Hazezon-tamar = "dividing the date-palm"
  1. an Amorite city
  2. a town situated in the desert Judah; probably Engedi
  3. maybe the 'Tamar' of Solomon's day

Origin: from H2686 and H8558

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
